subcodes.first_line: Hallowed praise, sanctified beyond mention and utterance, befitteth Him Who is the Desire of all worlds, Who hath illumined the world with the lights of oneness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقدس از ذکر و بیان مقصود عالمیان را لایق و سزاست که عالم را بانوار توحید
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @station of the Manifestation of God, @purpose; goal of creation, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God
